scripts.build:the-owl: npm --prefix ../.. install && npm --prefix ../.. run build && pnpm install
scripts.test:create-docs: rimraf .owl docs && CREATE_DOCS=true vitest run && the-owl build
scripts.test:create-docs:hosted: rimraf .owl docs && CREATE_DOCS=true vitest run && THE_OWL_DOCS_HOST=https://api.example.com the-owl build
